core_mechanism: recovery of an unknown coordinate warping (diffeomorphism) that maps an inhomogeneous field back onto a homogeneous/isotropic reference, identified and estimated from the spatially-varying local second-order (covariance) structure of a single densely-sampled realization
brief_reason: The abstract frames nonstationary fields as isotropic (homogeneous) fields composed with an unknown spatial deformation, and estimates that deformation map from dense observations of one realization, i.e. inverting a warping to restore stationarity via local covariance information.
